01-fiesta-de-los-muertos-feuershow.jpg.alt: Día de los Muertos show with two columns of fire and a flower altar by the water at night
01-fiesta-de-los-muertos-feuershow.jpg.caption: Fire, flowers, skulls — the almost-pretty moment before it all goes bang again.

04-dia-de-los-muertos-gitarrist.jpg.alt: Día de los Muertos performer in a sombrero and sugar-skull make-up, lit green
04-dia-de-los-muertos-gitarrist.jpg.caption: The only one with any rhythm that night. And he's dead.

08-dracula-4d-clown-kanone.jpg.alt: Clown performer with a wheeled cannon in front of a Dracula 4D cinema at night
08-dracula-4d-clown-kanone.jpg.caption: A clown with a cannon outside the Dracula cinema. All perfectly normal here.

09-kettensaegen-clown-raupe.jpg.alt: Clown with a chainsaw in front of a caterpillar ride, lit green and purple
09-kettensaegen-clown-raupe.jpg.caption: Clown plus chainsaw — what could possibly go wrong?

22-totengraeber-blau.jpg.alt: Gravedigger performer with a shovel between two columns, lit blue
22-totengraeber-blau.jpg.caption: Overtime under the blue lights. The grave won't dig itself.

23-alter-mann-friedhof-blau.jpg.alt: Older performer in a top hat in a blue-lit cemetery
23-alter-mann-friedhof-blau.jpg.caption: He's been standing there a while. And yes: he's waiting for you.

24-wald-zombie-totes-tier.jpg.alt: Zombie performer in the woods holding a dead animal, fog
24-wald-zombie-totes-tier.jpg.caption: She's brought something along. What it used to be, we didn't ask.
